pi_items.source: FITS header (INSTRUME='WFPC2') and ESA Hubble dataset URL.

pi_items.metadata_value: HST WFPC2 F555W observation of globular cluster NGC 6652
pi_items.verified_value: HST WFPC2 F439W observation of globular cluster NGC 6652
pi_items.source: FITS header (FILTNAM1='F439W') from the downloaded 555wmos.zip file which incorrectly contains the F439W data.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real FITS data downloaded from the ESA Hubble FITS Liberator dataset for globular cluster NGC 6652. The image provided to the task, claimed to be a V-band (F555W) observation, actually contains the B-band (F439W) data due to an error in the original ESA Hubble distribution where 555wmos.zip and 439wmos.zip contain identical F439W images. The FITS header confirms the instrument is WFPC2 and the filter is F439W.
